# Pull Request: [Title]

## Description

[Provide a clear and concise description of the changes]

## Related Issues

[Link to any related issues, e.g., Closes #123, Fixes #456]

## Changes Made

- [ ] Described in commit messages
- [ ] Description updated above

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional changes, no api changes)
- [ ] Chore (build process, dependencies, etc.)

## Testing

[Describe how you tested your changes]

- [ ] Manual testing on iOS
- [ ] Manual testing on Android
- [ ] TypeScript type checking passed (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] ESLint passed (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] All existing functionality still works

## Screenshots/Video (if applicable)

[Attach screenshots or screen recordings showing the changes]

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have updated documentation where necessary
- [ ] All tests pass (typecheck, lint)
